media.page.title: Media

media.gallery.no_images: No images yet. Upload images to get started.

media.field.type.description: Whether the file is a thumbnail or a regular image

media.delete.confirm.title: Delete Media
media.delete.confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this media file? This action cannot be undone.
